name: Clafouti (Cherry Flan)
recipeInstructions:
Use fresh black, sweet cherries in season. Otherwise, use drained,
canned, pitted Bing cherries.
1. In a blender, combine milk, granulated sugar, eggs, vanilla extract, salt, and sifted flour. Blend at high speed for 1 minute until smooth.
2. Butter a 2-quart fireproof baking dish that is 1-1/2 inches deep.
3. Pour about 1/4 inch of batter into the prepared baking dish. Place over moderate heat for 1-2 minutes, or until a thin layer sets in the bottom of the dish.
4. Remove from heat. Scatter cherries evenly over the batter and sprinkle with granulated sugar.
5. Pour remaining batter over the cherries and spread to a smooth surface using the back of a spoon.
6. Place in preheated oven at middle rack, 350°F (175°C). Bake for about 55 minutes or 1 hour until puffed and golden brown.
7. A knife inserted into the center should come out clean when Clafouti is done.
8. Sprinkle with powdered sugar just before serving.
Serves: 6 to 8
